Cinema: Completing A Projecthttps://<lindsay-kislingbury>.github.io/post/cinema-3/Sat, 12 Nov 2022 21:47:41 +0000https://<lindsay-kislingbury>.github.io/post/cinema-3/My first attempt at styling a web page. At first, I was tempted to use bootstrap, but ultimately went with html/css only.
